expectations.text: the assistant refuses rather than running the skill
the refusal lists all five missing variables (PGHOST, PGPORT, PGUSER, PGDATABASE, PGPASSWORD) in a single message
the assistant does NOT take the 'db.internal:5432' from the user's prose and use it to set PGHOST/PGPORT itself or pass them as args
the assistant tells the user how to fix this (export the vars directly, or use a credential helper)
